loader_slogan: Savor the present, inspired by the past
header_welcome: Welcome to the Couronne hotel in Mies!
header_tagline:
Savor the present
inspired by the past
intro_desc: Located in the heart of Mies, the Auberge de la Couronne combines traditional charm with modern comfort. This welcoming hotel, situated near Lake Geneva, offers elegant rooms,  a refined restaurant, and easy access to Geneva and Lausanne.
restaurant_desc: Explore our various culinary offerings created by our chef
espaces_desc: Discover the different areas of our restaurant, each with its own unique atmosphere.
chambres_desc: Your next trip is taking shape. All that's left is to book your room
histoire_p1: For more than three generations, the Auberge de Mies – La Couronne has upheld the tradition of Swiss hospitality. Nestled in the heart of the village of Mies, our family-run establishment has preserved its authenticity while adapting to modern standards.
histoire_p2: Founded in 1892, La Couronne has always been a favorite gathering place for locals and travelers alike. Today, we continue this rich history by offering exceptional cuisine and quality accommodations.
histoire_p3:
Over 130 years of history
Tradition and excellence since 1892
localisation_desc:
Auberge de Mies – La Couronne
Rue du Village 30, 1295 Mies, Suisse
localisation_parking_desc: Free parking spaces are available in front of the building
localisation_transport_desc: Accessible by public transportation; bus stop nearby
localisation_access_desc: Facility accessible to people with disabilities
instagram_desc: Discover our latest dishes, the atmosphere of our inn, and a behind-the-scenes look at our authentic kitchen.
hub_wa_desc: Quick and easy booking via WhatsApp. A personalized response from our team.
hub_online_desc: A comprehensive booking platform with instant confirmation and secure payment.
hotel_desc: Discover our comfortable rooms in the heart of the village of Mies
hotel_card1_f1: Rooms that have been recently and carefully renovated
hotel_card1_f3: Ideal for business and vacation travelers
hotel_card2_f2: A spacious balcony where you can relax
hotel_card3_f1: A bathroom that has been recently renovated
hotel_card3_f2: Walk-in shower for a moment of relaxation
menu_no_menu_desc: Contact us to find out today's specials
